caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard, wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, is positioned in front of a professional microphone. He is in a recording studio featuring dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture on the walls. The microphone is held by a silver metal boom arm, which has the text " Rode NT1-A" visible on it. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions and mouth movements shift slightly. He begins with his mouth open, transitions to a more closed position with a slight frown, and then opens his mouth again as he continues talking. He maintains a steady gaze toward the side, and his posture remains consistent throughout the recording session.
